requirement_topic.en: Current NEPRA Prosumer / Net-Metering Customer Route
requirement_topic.zh: 现行 NEPRA 产消者 / 净计量客户路径
requirement_topic.zht: 現行 NEPRA 產消者 / 淨計量客戶路徑

summary.en: For customer-side distributed solar, treat the National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (Prosumer) Regulations, 2026 as the primary current route to confirm, with the 2015 Alternative & Renewable Energy Distributed Generation and Net Metering Regulations retained as historical context and amendment history. Inverter files should support the actual route selected by the Pakistan customer, DISCO, and project team.
summary.zh: 对于用户侧分布式太阳能，应将 2026 年 NEPRA《产消者条例》作为当前需优先确认的主要路径，并将 2015 年《替代及可再生能源分布式发电与净计量条例》作为历史背景和修订沿革保留。逆变器资料应支持巴基斯坦客户、DISCO 和项目团队实际选择的路径。
summary.zht: 對於用戶側分散式太陽能，應將 2026 年 NEPRA《產消者條例》作為當前需優先確認的主要路徑，並將 2015 年《替代及再生能源分散式發電與淨計量條例》作為歷史背景和修訂沿革保留。逆變器資料應支持巴基斯坦客戶、DISCO 和專案團隊實際選擇的路徑。

standards_or_laws: National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (Prosumer) Regulations, 2026
NEPRA (Alternative & Renewable Energy) Distributed Generation and Net Metering Regulations, 2015

summary.en: China rooftop or distributed-PV documents may include GB/T grid-function evidence and Chinese utility acceptance records, but they do not create a Pakistan prosumer, net-metering, DISCO, or interconnection approval.
summary.zh: 中国户用或分布式光伏文件可能包括 GB/T 并网功能证据和中国电网验收记录，但不能形成巴基斯坦产消者、净计量、DISCO 或并网批准。
summary.zht: 中國戶用或分散式光伏文件可能包括 GB/T 併網功能證據和中國電網驗收記錄，但不能形成巴基斯坦產消者、淨計量、DISCO 或併網批准。

gap.en: Confirm whether the customer is applying as a prosumer, legacy net-metering customer, distributed generator, self-use project, or project-specific applicant; then align inverter datasheets, anti-islanding data, protection settings, single-line diagrams, meter interface details, local installer declarations, and commissioning forms to that route.
gap.zh: 应确认客户是作为产消者、历史净计量客户、分布式发电方、自用项目还是项目特定申请方办理；然后将逆变器数据表、防孤岛数据、保护参数、单线图、计量接口细节、当地安装方声明和调试表格与该路径对齐。
gap.zht: 應確認客戶是作為產消者、歷史淨計量客戶、分散式發電方、自用專案還是專案特定申請方辦理；然後將逆變器資料表、防孤島資料、保護參數、單線圖、計量接口細節、當地安裝方聲明和調試表格與該路徑對齊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for customers seeking current NEPRA / DISCO prosumer, net-metering, distributed-generation, or interconnection processing
mandatory_status.cn: China grid evidence is supporting documentation only for Pakistan customer approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use the current prosumer route as the primary customer-route check; keep 2015 net-metering language as history unless the Pakistan reviewer says it still controls the case.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将现行产消者路径作为主要客户路径核验；除非巴基斯坦审查方说明其仍控制该案，否则将 2015 年净计量表述作为历史背景保留。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將現行產消者路徑作為主要客戶路徑核驗；除非巴基斯坦審查方說明其仍控制該案，否則將 2015 年淨計量表述作為歷史背景保留。

requirement_topic.en: NEPRA / DISCO Grid-Connectivity Settings and Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: NEPRA / DISCO 并网参数与项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: NEPRA / DISCO 併網參數與專案證據

summary.en: NEPRA's legal index lists 2026 technical standards for grid connectivity. For PV inverter deployments, the project file should be ready for the applicable DISCO or project route, including capacity, site type, export mode, applicant identity, voltage / frequency protection, anti-islanding, power factor, reactive-power behavior, ride-through where relevant, and commissioning records.
summary.zh: NEPRA 法规索引列有 2026 年并网技术标准。对于光伏逆变器部署，项目文件应能支持适用的 DISCO 或项目路径，包括容量、场站类型、上网模式、申请主体、电压/频率保护、防孤岛、功率因数、无功行为、适用时的穿越能力和调试记录。
summary.zht: NEPRA 法規索引列有 2026 年併網技術標準。對於光伏逆變器部署，專案文件應能支持適用的 DISCO 或專案路徑，包括容量、場站類型、上網模式、申請主體、電壓／頻率保護、防孤島、功率因數、無功行為、適用時的穿越能力和調試記錄。

standards_or_laws: National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (Technical Standards for Grid Connectivity) Regulations, 2026
Applicable DISCO interconnection and commissioning requirements

summary.en: GB/T reports can show technical capability, but Pakistani acceptance depends on the current NEPRA / DISCO route and project-specific settings, forms, and site evidence.
summary.zh: GB/T 报告可展示技术能力，但巴基斯坦接受取决于当前 NEPRA / DISCO 路径以及项目特定参数、表格和现场证据。
summary.zht: GB/T 報告可展示技術能力，但巴基斯坦接受取決於當前 NEPRA / DISCO 路徑以及專案特定參數、表格和現場證據。

gap.en: Prepare a Pakistan grid settings sheet and project matrix covering capacity, DISCO, single-line diagram, meter arrangement, protection values, firmware profile, anti-islanding test evidence, commissioning checklist, and final handover.
gap.zh: 应准备巴基斯坦并网参数表和项目矩阵，覆盖容量、DISCO、单线图、计量安排、保护数值、固件配置、防孤岛测试证据、调试清单和最终移交。
gap.zht: 應準備巴基斯坦併網參數表和專案矩陣，覆蓋容量、DISCO、單線圖、計量安排、保護數值、韌體配置、防孤島測試證據、調試清單和最終移交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where current NEPRA technical standards, DISCO approval, project owner requirements, or commissioning process applies
mandatory_status.cn: China settings and utility files are not acceptable by default for Pakistan commissioning

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Pakistan grid file must be DISCO- and project-facing; generic factory evidence should be mapped to local settings and commissioning records.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦并网文件必须面向 DISCO 和项目；通用工厂证据应映射到当地参数和调试记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦併網文件必須面向 DISCO 和專案；通用工廠證據應映射到當地參數和調試記錄。
